title: Mario Luigi Superstar Saga Battle Theme Mario Paint Composer
description:
I think I enjoyed making this a lot. It took me a little amount of time and came out well. I was so pleased that I kind of went crazy at the end (you will see so in a minute). My video recorder lagged it a bit and there is a small gap in between some of the clips that I can't help (the recorder's hotkeys won't work -.- ). Enjoy and comment!

Software used:
Music: Mario Paint Composer - http://www.unfungames.com/mariopaint/

Notation: MidiNotate Player - http://www.notation.com/MidiNotatePlayer.htm

Video: FreezScreen Video Capture - (not recommended)

All free, legal, and unlimited.
